pfunc_desc: Kordhi falanqeeyaha adigoo ku daraya shaqooyin macquul ah
pfunc_time_too_long: Qalad: #time aad u badan ayaa la isticmaalay.
pfunc_time_too_big: Qalad: #time waxa uu taageeraa sanado kaliya ilaa 9999.
pfunc_time_too_small: Qalad: #time waxa uu taageeraa sanado kaliya laga bilaabo 0.
pfunc_rel2abs_invalid_depth: Qalad: qoto dheerta waddada "$1" waa aan saxnayn (waxay isku dayday inay gasho meel ka baxsan xididka).
pfunc_expr_stack_exhausted: Qalad: muujinta ayaa fashilantay sababtoo ah xusuusta ayaa buuxsamay.
pfunc_expr_unexpected_number: Qalad: tiro aan la fileyn ayaa la helay.
pfunc_expr_unrecognised_word: Muujinta khaladaadka: Erayga aan la aqoonsan "$1".
pfunc_expr_unexpected_operator: Qalad: $1 waa hawlgal aan la fileyn.
pfunc_expr_unrecognised_punctuation: Muujinta khaladaadka: Astaamaha shaqaaleenta ee aan la aqoonin "$1".
pfunc_expr_invalid_argument: Dood aan saxnayn $1: ka yar -1 ama ka weyn 1.
pfunc_expr_invalid_argument_ln: Dood aan saxnayn ln: ka yar ama la mid 0.
pfunc_expr_unknown_error: Qalad muujin: khalad aan la aqoon ($1).
